calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To May-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JESUS MONTIEL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot. Order granting stay of the case and compel arbitration filed March 26, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Continued To Nov-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Litigation Proceedings And Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Atty. Maria Bellafronto (408-286-9800) appearing for Plaintiff and moving party Mission Street Ventures. Appearing through Court Call Atty. Thomas Smutto (949-874-3555) appearing for Defendant and opposing party Jesus Montiel.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
PLAINTIFF MISSION STREET VENTURES Motion To Stay Litigation Proceedings And Compel Binding Arbitration is GRANT STAY AND MOTION TO COMPEL. See paragraph 34.A and 34.B of the Purchase Agreement. Also $3,420 attorney's fees grant pursuant to paragraph 26. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
